lessons.summary: Replace CSS id selectors with getByRole for button locators
lessons.detail: CSS id selectors like #btn-search and #btn-confirm are fragile. Use page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Search Flights' }) for stability and accessibility compliance.
lessons.impact: Improves locator stability and follows webUi.md PART 5 priority order

lessons.summary: Use filter({ hasText }) instead of nth()/first() for flight item selection
lessons.detail: When selecting a specific flight from a list, use locator.filter({ hasText: flightCode }) to target by content rather than index. This is more resilient to list order changes.
lessons.impact: Prevents brittle index-based locators, follows webUi.md PART 5 anti-patterns

lessons.summary: Inline HTML mock via page.setContent() enables fast isolated UI tests without a server
lessons.detail: For systems using inline HTML mock, centralizing the HTML in the Page Object (setupMockPage()) keeps spec files clean and makes the mock reusable across all test cases.
lessons.impact: Reduces spec file complexity, improves test isolation and reusability
